testcase.name: test_doula_dashboard_loads
test_doula_client_create_uses_provider_id
testcase.failure: tests/test_provider_id_standardization.py:122: in test_doula_client_create_uses_provider_id assert response.status_code == 201, f"Create client failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create client failed: {"client_id":"client_71a4e61abc75","provider_id":"demo_doula_fc5d0af2","provider_type":"DOULA","name":"TEST_ProviderID_Client","email":"test.providerid@example.com","phone":null,"edd":"2026-08-15","planned_birth_setting":"Hospital","status":"Lead","linked_mom_id":null,"risk_flags":[],"internal_notes":null,"created_at":"2026-02-19T21:49:34.972320+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-19T21:49:34.972320+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_midwife_client_create_uses_provider_id
testcase.failure: tests/test_provider_id_standardization.py:187: in test_midwife_client_create_uses_provider_id assert response.status_code == 201, f"Create client failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create client failed: {"client_id":"client_0abbf52b4399","provider_id":"demo_midwife_d44ee13d","provider_type":"MIDWIFE","name":"TEST_Midwife_ProviderID","email":"test.midwifeproviderid@example.com","phone":null,"edd":"2026-09-20","planned_birth_setting":"Home","status":"Prenatal","linked_mom_id":null,"risk_flags":[],"internal_notes":null,"created_at":"2026-02-19T21:49:35.569138+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-19T21:49:35.569138+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_doula_client_details_use_provider_id
test_midwife_client_details_use_provider_id
